name: WRAP TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
summary: PART I Overview We are a global public safety technology and services company focused on delivering integrated non-lethal solutions for law enforcement, corrections, defense, and other public safety organizations worldwide. Our mission is to enable safer outcomes by providing officers and agencies with the tools, training, and tactics to gain proactive, lawful control of encounters, reducing risk to both officers and subjects, while preserving tactical advantage.
